rawIntent: Install 'dotenv' and 'pg' as dependencies in package.json. Add '@types/express' as a dev dependency. Update src/app.ts to explicitly define types for 'req' and 'res' parameters in the GET /metrics endpoint.

successCriteria.description: The 'dotenv' and 'pg' packages are listed as dependencies in package.json, and '@types/express' is listed as a dev dependency. The GET /metrics endpoint in src/app.ts has explicitly defined types for 'req' and 'res'.

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
RBAC enforcement: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
